title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. neodontotrichodes
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. neodontotrichodes, commonly known as a species of hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to certain regions. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation, and its herbal preparations may include infusions, teas, or tinctures made from its leaves and flowers. However, more research is needed to confirm the plant's efficacy and safety for human consumption.
